messages.content:
I can’t directly run tasks or execute the repository from here.

If “load test task 0” refers to a specific script, benchmark, or job in your project, share the exact command or the task definition and I can help you:
- identify what it will do,
- estimate expected output,
- debug failures,
- or write the command you should run locally.

If you want me to make changes for it, please submit again with a concrete coding request (or turn off Chat-only mode if you’re using it).

nextActions.label: Continue chat
nextActions.description: Ask a follow-up question in the same thread.
